label_notes: Source: training knowledge. MyFitnessPal collects extensive health and sensitive personal data. Known to sell data to third parties including advertisers and data brokers. Does not honor standard privacy signals. Data sharing is extensive. Sensitive health information shared broadly, which is notable privacy concern.
